vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

verify.value: All required fields present and valid.
verify.rule: Ensure all specified fields are included and correctly formatted.
The mass estimate must fall within the specified tolerance range.

verify.value: All physical features traceable to part_tree.
verify.rule: Each geometry operation must correspond to a feature in the part_tree.

verify.value: Interfaces named with exact neighboring subsystem labels.
verify.rule: Interfaces must specify the exact neighboring subsystem labels and necessary features.

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence for critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints must have visible evidence of locking or preload mechanisms.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion mismatch between CFRP and aluminum components.
risk.mit: Use compatible materials or incorporate thermal expansion compensation features.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient clearance for moving parts in the spar_socket.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearance dimensions based on actual component sizes.

risk.desc: Possible misalignment during assembly due to complex interface geometries.
risk.mit: Implement additional alignment aids and improve assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate fastener preload leading to structural failure.
risk.mit: Conduct pre-load tests and ensure proper torque specifications are followed.

risk.desc: Potential for electrical interference between avionics and flight control systems.
risk.mit: Implement shielding and grounding measures to reduce electromagnetic interference.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

physics_paths.description: Transfers wing load into fuselage spine

Data transmission between avionics and flight control

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for alignment and fit, non-destructive testing for structural integrity

verification_focus: Structural load transfer from wing spar to fuselage spine
Electrical/data connectivity between avionics and flight control system
